title: Hidden Cascade
description: A gentle waterfall veiled behind trailing ivy and wild vines, nature reclaiming its own quiet corner.

title: Concrete Solitude
description: Empty chairs on a rooftop terrace framed by raw brutalist geometry, a pause between city and sky.

title: Mirrored Facade
description: A building dissolves into its own reflection on still water, blurring the line between solid and liquid.

title: Ultraviolet Gallery
description: Mannequin figures bathed in UV light at an immersive art exhibition, glowing against the darkness.

title: Suspended in Blue
description: Delicate blue forms hang suspended in space, illuminated by scattered points of light like a frozen constellation.

title: Garden Blues
description: Vivid blue wildflowers reaching upward in a lush garden, tiny petals catching the soft light.

title: Purple Sonata
description: An ornate antique piano stands dramatic against a sweeping purple projection, where classical craft meets digital art.

title: Paris Through the Keyhole
description: The Eiffel Tower perfectly framed through a circular opening in a dark wall, a secret glimpse of the city.

title: Window on Paris
description: The Eiffel Tower and the Luxor Obelisk seen through a grand window with golden frame and linen curtains.
